description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block structure, composed of stacked concrete or stone slabs forming a solid wall. The lower portion is made of rough, irregularly shaped natural stone, while the upper section consists of smooth, uniform concrete blocks with visible seams. Reinforcing steel rods protrude from the top and sides, suggesting ongoing construction or reinforcement. The base is embedded in a foundation of rough stone, providing stability and a contrasting texture to the smoother upper blocks. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use as a retaining wall or barrier in an urban environment.
description: A robust stone and concrete block wall with a rough stone base and smooth upper blocks, reinforced with steel rods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth concrete block face above a rough stone foundation, with steel rods visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the thickness of the wall, the layered construction, and the embedded steel rods.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth of the structure and the integration of rough and smooth stonework.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous concrete block surface and the full extent of the stone base.
attribute_location_context: modern retaining wall in an urban infrastructure setting
attribute_installation_method: reinforced and mortared onto a stone foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: Minimal visible weathering; the stone base shows some natural texture and slight discoloration, while the concrete blocks appear relatively new.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: forms part of a continuous wall, integrated with a stone foundation
